title: Shell and TotalEnergies Issue Force Majeure After Qatar LNG Shut Down
summary: Several major energy traders have begun declaring force majeure to their own customers after Qatar’s LNG shutdown rippled through global gas markets, according to Reuters sources on Wednesday. title: Weekly mortgage demand from homebuyers increased despite big interest rate volatility
summary: Mortgage rates surged higher last week to due rising oil prices, causing a recent boom in refinancing to pull back.
